Chieftain Zhan Ashû can be found atop Dol Acharn in eastern Dagorlad. You have bested the chieftain in combat and he now wishes to speak to you. You s…
Faramir can be found due west of Dol Acharn in Dagorlad. You have told the Wainrider chieftain of the Bloodletter's heritage and of the banner he bear…
